mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM member WHERE memberId=#{memberId}) THEN 'false' ELSE 'true' END
SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM member WHERE memberNickname=#{nickName}) THEN 'false' ELSE 'true' END
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member(memberId, memberPw, memberName, memberBirth1, memberBirth2, memberPhone1, memberPhone2, memberPhone3, memberNickname, memberImage, memberEmail1, memberEmail2, memberZip1, memberZip2, memberZip3, memberEmailReceotion, memberSmsReceotion) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{memberPw}, #{memberName}, #{memberBirth1}, #{memberBirth2}, #{memberPhone1}, #{memberPhone2}, #{memberPhone3}, #{memberNickname}, #{memberImage}, #{memberEmail1}, #{memberEmail2}, #{memberZip1}, #{memberZip2}, #{memberZip3}, #{memberEmailReceotion}, #{memberSmsReceotion})
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'FALSE' ELSE 'TRUE' END FROM member WHERE memberPhone1 || memberPhone2 || memberPhone3 = #{phone}
